/usr/bin/g++ -g CMakeFiles/simplemovie.dir/sample/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/simplemovie.dir/sample/src/util.cpp.o CMakeFiles/simplemovie.dir/__/__/code/main/tuidunaligned.cpp.o -o simplemovie  libradmovie.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libSDL2main.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libopenal.so ../pure3d/libp3d.a ../pure3d/libpddi.a ../radcore/libradcore.a ../radsound/libradsound.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libpng.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libz.so ../radcontent/libradcontent.a ../pure3d/libpddi.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libGL.so ../radmath/libradmath.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libopenal.so ../radcore/libradcore.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libSDL2.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libSDL2main.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libavformat.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libavcodec.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libavutil.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libswresample.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libswscale.so
